name: Cardinals Promise
description: Cardinals Promise (CARD) is a fixed-cap ERC-20 token on Ethereum. Maximum supply is hard-capped on-chain at 250,000,000 CARD; the contract has no fees, hooks, blocklists, or pausing.
notes: Official site: thecardinalspromise.com (the book's established domain — token page at /card; cp17.org may redirect there). Fill in contract addresses after deployment before submitting to Etherscan token update, CoinGecko, or a Uniswap token list. Etherscan requires a 32x32 PNG icon — use assets/logo-32.png.
